reviews.comment:
Cada vez que paso por Colón es parada obligatoria el ACA de ahí, buen servicio y si sos socio descuento a la orden, limpieza en Shop, baños y por supuesto en playa de atención.

(Translated by Google)
Every time I pass through Colón, the ACA is a must-stop. It's great service, and if you're a member, you get a discount. Cleanliness in the shop, restrooms, and, of course, beach service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJay1HSEdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy atentos los playeros. Rico café y es parada obligada para la carga de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very attentive. The coffee was great, and it's a must-stop for refueling.
